examples: This is because, according to Archimedes' principle of displacement, floating objects displace their own weight in water.
It wasn't until 1906 that a scholar came across the prayer book in a library and realized it was a palimpsest, and that the underlying layer of texts could only have come from Archimedes.
It is also known as Archimedes' constant.
What new insights on Archimedes's thought will emerge from all this remains to be seen.
Archimedes realized that the level of water in a bath changed as he climbed in, making it an indicator of volume.
